name: notifications
description: Manage notifications — creates a notification subscription for a given bucket, retrieves a list of notification subscriptions for a given bucket, view a notification configuration. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: bucket
parameters.description: The parent bucket of the notification.

parameters.name: userProject
parameters.description: The project to be billed for this request. Required for Requester Pays buckets.
